task: Given these three upstream commits: (1) 'feat: add streaming token cache to provider layer', (2) 'fix: retry on 429 rate limit with backoff', (3) 'feat: parallel tool-call execution in agent loop' - identify the highest-signal engineering trends and produce a short research note. For each trend cite which commit it came from.
rubric: each trend cites its source commit
no invented features not present in the commits

task: Summarize what a 'model tiering' strategy is for an autonomous agent fleet and why it reduces cost, in 3-5 sentences. Do not invent specific price numbers you were not given.
rubric: explains cheap-vs-expensive model routing per task
